Interface BoundListOperations<K,V>

All Superinterfaces:
BoundKeyOperations<K>
@NullUnmarked public interface BoundListOperations<K,V> extends BoundKeyOperations<K>
List operations bound to a certain key.
Author:
Costin Leau, Mark Paluch

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    V
    getFirst()
    Returns the first element from the list at the bound key.
    V
    getLast()
    Returns the last element from the list at the bound key.
    @NonNull RedisOperations<K,V>
    getOperations()
     
    V
    index(long index)
    Get element at index from list at the bound key.
    Long
    indexOf(V value)
    Returns the index of the first occurrence of the specified value in the list at at key.
    Long
    lastIndexOf(V value)
    Returns the index of the last occurrence of the specified value in the list at at key.
    V
    leftPop()
    Removes and returns first element in list stored at the bound key.
    List<V>
    leftPop(long count)
    Removes and returns first elements in list stored at key.
    V
    leftPop(long timeout, @NonNull TimeUnit unit)
    Deprecated.
    since 4.1 in favor of leftPop(Duration).
    default V
    leftPop(Duration timeout)
    Removes and returns first element from lists stored at the bound key .
    Long
    leftPush(@NonNull V pivot, V value)
    Prepend values to the bound key before value.
    Long
    leftPush(V value)
    Prepend value to the bound key.
    Long
    leftPushAll(V... values)
    Prepend values to the bound key.
    Long
    leftPushIfPresent(V value)
    Prepend values to the bound key only if the list exists.
    V
    move(@NonNull RedisListCommands.Direction from, @NonNull K destinationKey, @NonNull RedisListCommands.Direction to)
    Atomically returns and removes the first/last element (head/tail depending on the from argument) of the list stored at the bound key, and pushes the element at the first/last element (head/tail depending on the to argument) of the list stored at destinationKey.
    V
    move(@NonNull RedisListCommands.Direction from, @NonNull K destinationKey, @NonNull RedisListCommands.Direction to, long timeout, @NonNull TimeUnit unit)
    Deprecated.
    since 4.1 in favor of move(Direction, Object, Direction, Duration).
    V
    move(@NonNull RedisListCommands.Direction from, @NonNull K destinationKey, @NonNull RedisListCommands.Direction to, @NonNull Duration timeout)
    Atomically returns and removes the first/last element (head/tail depending on the from argument) of the list stored at the bound key, and pushes the element at the first/last element (head/tail depending on the to argument) of the list stored at destinationKey.
    List<V>
    range(long start, long end)
    Get elements between begin and end from list at the bound key.
    Long
    remove(long count, Object value)
    Removes the first count occurrences of value from the list stored at the bound key.
    V
    rightPop()
    Removes and returns last element in list stored at the bound key.
    List<V>
    rightPop(long count)
    Removes and returns last elements in list stored at key.
    V
    rightPop(long timeout, @NonNull TimeUnit unit)
    Deprecated.
    since 4.1 in favor of leftPop(Duration).
    default V
    rightPop(@NonNull Duration timeout)
    Removes and returns last element from lists stored at the bound key.
    Long
    rightPush(@NonNull V pivot, V value)
    Append values to the bound key before value.
    Long
    rightPush(V value)
    Append value to the bound key.
    Long
    rightPushAll(V @NonNull ... values)
    Append values to the bound key.
    Long
    rightPushIfPresent(V value)
    Append values to the bound key only if the list exists.
    void
    set(long index, V value)
    Set the value list element at index.
    Long
    size()
    Get the size of list stored at the bound key.
    void
    trim(long start, long end)
    Trim list at the bound key to elements between start and end.

    Methods inherited from interface BoundKeyOperations

    expiration, expire, expire, expire, expireAt, expireAt, getExpire, getKey, getType, persist, rename

  • Method Details

    • range

      List<V> range(long start, long end)
      Get elements between begin and end from list at the bound key.
      Parameters:
      start -
      end -
      Returns:
      null when used in pipeline / transaction.
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: LRANGE

      void trim(long start, long end)
      Trim list at the bound key to elements between start and end.
      Parameters:
      start -
      end -
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: LTRIM

      Get the size of list stored at the bound key.
      Returns:
      null when used in pipeline / transaction.

      Prepend values to the bound key only if the list exists.

      Returns:
      null when used in pipeline / transaction.

      Append values to the bound key.
      Parameters:
      values -
      Returns:
      null when used in pipeline / transaction.

      • Redis Documentation: RPUSH

      Long rightPushIfPresent(V value)
      Append values to the bound key only if the list exists.
      Parameters:
      value -
      Returns:
      null when used in pipeline / transaction.
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: RPUSHX

    • rightPush

      Long rightPush(@NonNull V pivot, V value)
      Append values to the bound key before value.
      Parameters:
      value -
      Returns:
      null when used in pipeline / transaction.
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: RPUSH

    • move

      V move(@NonNull RedisListCommands.Direction from, @NonNull K destinationKey, @NonNull RedisListCommands.Direction to)
      Atomically returns and removes the first/last element (head/tail depending on the from argument) of the list stored at the bound key, and pushes the element at the first/last element (head/tail depending on the to argument) of the list stored at destinationKey.
      Parameters:
      from - must not be null.
      destinationKey - must not be null.
      to - must not be null.
      Returns:
      null when used in pipeline / transaction.
      Since:
      2.6
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: LMOVE

    • move

      V move(@NonNull RedisListCommands.Direction from, @NonNull K destinationKey, @NonNull RedisListCommands.Direction to, @NonNull Duration timeout)
      Atomically returns and removes the first/last element (head/tail depending on the from argument) of the list stored at the bound key, and pushes the element at the first/last element (head/tail depending on the to argument) of the list stored at destinationKey.

      Blocks connection until element available or timeout reached.

      Parameters:
      from - must not be null.
      destinationKey - must not be null.
      to - must not be null.
      timeout -
      Returns:
      null when used in pipeline / transaction.
      Since:
      2.6
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: BLMOVE

    • move

      @Deprecated(since="4.1") V move(@NonNull RedisListCommands.Direction from, @NonNull K destinationKey, @NonNull RedisListCommands.Direction to, long timeout, @NonNull TimeUnit unit)
      Deprecated.
      since 4.1 in favor of move(Direction, Object, Direction, Duration).
      Atomically returns and removes the first/last element (head/tail depending on the from argument) of the list stored at the bound key, and pushes the element at the first/last element (head/tail depending on the to argument) of the list stored at destinationKey.

      Blocks connection until element available or timeout reached.

      Parameters:
      from - must not be null.
      destinationKey - must not be null.
      to - must not be null.
      timeout -
      unit -
      Returns:
      null when used in pipeline / transaction.
      Since:
      2.6
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: BLMOVE

    • set

      void set(long index, V value)
      Set the value list element at index.
      Parameters:
      index -
      value -
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: LSET

    • remove

      Long remove(long count, Object value)
      Removes the first count occurrences of value from the list stored at the bound key.
      Parameters:
      count -
      value -
      Returns:
      null when used in pipeline / transaction.
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: LREM

    • getFirst

      V getFirst()
      Returns the first element from the list at the bound key.
      Returns:
      null when used in pipeline / transaction.
      Since:
      3.4

    • getLast

      V getLast()
      Returns the last element from the list at the bound key.
      Returns:
      null when used in pipeline / transaction.
      Since:
      3.4

    • index

      V index(long index)
      Get element at index from list at the bound key.
      Parameters:
      index -
      Returns:
      null when used in pipeline / transaction.
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: LINDEX

    • indexOf

      Long indexOf(V value)
      Returns the index of the first occurrence of the specified value in the list at at key.
      Requires Redis 6.0.6 or newer.
      Parameters:
      value - must not be null.
      Returns:
      null when used in pipeline / transaction or when not contained in list.
      Since:
      2.4
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: LPOS

    • lastIndexOf

      Long lastIndexOf(V value)
      Returns the index of the last occurrence of the specified value in the list at at key.
      Requires Redis 6.0.6 or newer.
      Parameters:
      value - must not be null.
      Returns:
      null when used in pipeline / transaction or when not contained in list.
      Since:
      2.4
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: LPOS

    • leftPop

      V leftPop()
      Removes and returns first element in list stored at the bound key.
      Returns:
      null when used in pipeline / transaction.
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: LPOP

    • leftPop

      List<V> leftPop(long count)
      Removes and returns first elements in list stored at key.
      Parameters:
      count -
      Returns:
      can be null.
      Since:
      2.6
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: LPOP

    • leftPop

      @Deprecated(since="4.1") V leftPop(long timeout, @NonNull TimeUnit unit)
      Deprecated.
      since 4.1 in favor of leftPop(Duration).
      Removes and returns first element from lists stored at the bound key .
      Blocks connection until element available or timeout reached.
      Parameters:
      timeout -
      unit - must not be null.
      Returns:
      null when timeout reached or used in pipeline / transaction.
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: BLPOP

    • leftPop

      default V leftPop(Duration timeout)
      Removes and returns first element from lists stored at the bound key .
      Blocks connection until element available or timeout reached.
      Parameters:
      timeout - must not be null.
      Returns:
      null when timeout reached or used in pipeline / transaction.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the timeout is null or negative.
      Since:
      2.3
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: BLPOP

    • rightPop

      V rightPop()
      Removes and returns last element in list stored at the bound key.
      Returns:
      null when used in pipeline / transaction.
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: RPOP

    • rightPop

      List<V> rightPop(long count)
      Removes and returns last elements in list stored at key.
      Parameters:
      count -
      Returns:
      can be null.
      Since:
      2.6
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: RPOP

    • rightPop

      @Deprecated(since="4.1") V rightPop(long timeout, @NonNull TimeUnit unit)
      Deprecated.
      since 4.1 in favor of leftPop(Duration).
      Removes and returns last element from lists stored at the bound key.
      Blocks connection until element available or timeout reached.
      Parameters:
      timeout -
      unit - must not be null.
      Returns:
      null when timeout reached or used in pipeline / transaction.
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: BRPOP

    • rightPop

      default V rightPop(@NonNull Duration timeout)
      Removes and returns last element from lists stored at the bound key.
      Blocks connection until element available or timeout reached.
      Parameters:
      timeout - must not be null.
      Returns:
      null when timeout reached or used in pipeline / transaction.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the timeout is null or negative.
      Since:
      2.3
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: BRPOP

    • getOperations

      @NonNull RedisOperations<K,V> getOperations()
      Specified by:
      getOperations in interface BoundKeyOperations<K>
      Returns:
      the underlying RedisOperations used to execute commands.
